name: Menese Protocol
description: Multi-chain crypto wallet, swaps, bridges, lending & strategies via Menese SDK

sdkCanisterId.label: SDK Canister ID
sdkCanisterId.help: The MeneseSDK canister ID. Default is the production SDK canister.

relayUrl.label: VPS Relay URL
relayUrl.help: HTTP endpoint of the VPS relay (reserved for future use).

autoApproveThreshold.label: Auto-Approve Threshold (USD)
autoApproveThreshold.help: Transactions below this USD value skip the confirmation prompt. 0 = always confirm.

developerKey.label: Developer Key
developerKey.help: Menese developer API key for authenticated relay access.

factoryCanisterId.label: Factory Canister ID
factoryCanisterId.help: MeneseAgent factory canister ID. Required for /deploy-agent to create new agent canisters.

factoryAdminSeed.label: Factory Admin Seed
factoryAdminSeed.help: Ed25519 hex seed for the factory admin identity. Required for spawning agent canisters.

testMode.label: Test Mode
testMode.help: When enabled, uses the test SDK canister instead of production.
